verification.reason: All claims are supported: bHLH/MYB interaction stated in paper; broader spectrum than Lc/C1 discussed in Discussion; F3'5'H activation by Del/Ros1 but not Lc/C1 explicitly stated; 'concentrations comparable to the anthocyanin levels found in blackberries and blueberries' in abstract; mouse lifespan data matches exactly (182.2 ± 8.6 d vs 142.0 ± 8.7 d; P<0.05 from Figure 4 and text).

The paper explicitly discusses: (1) Ros1 as MYB TF interacting with Del (bHLH) — stated directly; (2) MYB+bHLH combination giving higher induction than either alone — 'expression of both the MYB and the bHLH transcription factors gives rise to much higher levels of gene induction throughout all the tissues of the fruit compared to expression of either the MYB or the bHLH protein alone'; (3) PAL as rate-determining step in Solanaceae — referenced; (4) CHI limiting flux in tomato skin — stated; (5) F3'5'H required for DFR substrate specificity — explained; (6) superiority over Lc/C1 — discussed extensively.
